page.title: Your profile
page.subtitle: Manage your account, sign-in methods, and connected services.

connected_accounts.section_description: OAuth providers linked to your account.
connected_accounts.empty: No OAuth providers linked yet. Use the buttons on the login page to link one.

unlink.confirm_body: You won't be able to sign in with this provider anymore.

unlink.blocks_login_alert: This is your only way to sign in. Set a password before unlinking.
